A.instruction: Close your fingers into a fist and keep your thumb resting on the side of your index finger.

B.instruction: Keep all four fingers straight and together, and fold your thumb across your palm.

C.instruction: Curve your fingers and thumb to form a shape like the letter C.

D.instruction: Touch your thumb and middle, ring, and little fingers together while keeping your index finger straight up.

E.instruction: Bend all fingers inward toward the palm and keep your thumb close to the fingers.

F.instruction: Touch the tip of your thumb and index finger together, and keep the other three fingers straight.

G.instruction: Point your index finger straight to the side and keep your thumb extended parallel to it.

H.instruction: Extend your index and middle fingers together to the side, while folding the other fingers inward.

I.instruction: Make a fist and keep your little finger extended upward.

J.instruction: Start with the little finger extended and trace a J shape in the air.

K.instruction: Extend your index and middle fingers upward in a V shape, and place your thumb between them.

L.instruction: Extend your thumb and index finger to form an L shape, keeping other fingers folded.

M.instruction: Fold your thumb under your index, middle, and ring fingers, with all fingers closed over it.

N.instruction: Fold your thumb under your index and middle fingers, with the other fingers closed.

O.instruction: Curve all fingers and thumb together to form a round O shape.

P.instruction: Extend your index and middle fingers downward with thumb between them, similar to K but tilted downward.

Q.instruction: Point your index finger and thumb downward together while the other fingers remain folded.

R.instruction: Cross your index and middle fingers while keeping the other fingers folded.

S.instruction: Make a tight fist with your thumb wrapped across the front of your fingers.

T.instruction: Make a fist and tuck your thumb between your index finger and middle finger.

U.instruction: Extend your index and middle fingers straight upward together, keeping the other fingers folded.

V.instruction: Extend your index and middle fingers upward in a V shape, with other fingers folded.

W.instruction: Extend your index, middle, and ring fingers upward, keeping your thumb and little finger folded.

X.instruction: Curve your index finger into a hook shape while keeping the other fingers folded.

Y.instruction: Extend your thumb and little finger outward while folding the other fingers inward.

Z.instruction: Extend your index finger and draw the shape of Z in the air.
